{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Enforcing
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Enforcing]] is a technique used to strengthen the body with [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
